sourcesContent:
export const INITIAL_DEVICES = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "IMU Sensor",
    subtitle: "Inertial Measurement Unit",
    status: "online",
    pin: "GPIO 14, 15 (I2C)",
    type: "Sensor",
    temp: 22.5,
    uptime: "14d 3h 22m",
    lastSeen: "2 minutes ago",
    recovery: "Auto-restart on timeout",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Motor Controller",
    subtitle: "Servo Driver Board",
    status: "offline",
    pin: "PWM 5, 6, 9, 10",
    type: "Actuator",
    temp: 18.2,
    uptime: "0d 0h 0m",
    lastSeen: "1 hour ago",
    recovery: "Signal reset + calibration",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "LiDAR Module",
    subtitle: "Distance Sensor Array",
    status: "warning",
    pin: "UART TX/RX (16,17)",
    type: "Sensor",
    temp: 45.8,
    uptime: "7d 12h 5m",
    lastSeen: "5 seconds ago",
    recovery: "Temperature check + cooling",
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "GPS Module",
    subtitle: "Navigation Sensor",
    status: "online",
    pin: "UART TX/RX (8,9)",
    type: "Sensor",
    temp: 21.1,
    uptime: "30d 8h 15m",
    lastSeen: "10 seconds ago",
    recovery: "Self-diagnostic on signal loss",
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Camera Module",
    subtitle: "Vision Sensor",
    status: "warning",
    pin: "CSI Interface",
    type: "Sensor",
    temp: 38.2,
    uptime: "2d 1h 45m",
    lastSeen: "30 seconds ago",
    recovery: "Calibration check",
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Gripper Actuator",
    subtitle: "Servo Mechanism",
    status: "online",
    pin: "PWM 12",
    type: "Actuator",
    temp: null,
    uptime: "60d 4h 30m",
    lastSeen: "1 minute ago",
    recovery: "Position reset + torque check",
  },
];

export const INITIAL_COMPONENTS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "IMU Sensor",
    pin: "GPIO 14, 15 (I2C)",
    type: "Sensor",
    desc: "Inertial measurement unit for orientation tracking",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Motor Driver",
    pin: "PWM 5, 6, 9, 10",
    type: "Actuator",
    desc: "Four channel motor controller for quadcopter movement",
  },
];
